title: Epic: Unikernel Sandbox Verifier & Enterprise Hypervisor Runner
acceptance_criteria: Support local single-tenant offline unikernel runs
Integrated multi-tenant Firecracker virtualization daemon
Secure ephemeral storage cleanup
notes: Foundational epic for drover-runner and unikernel hypervisors.

title: Local KraftKit CLI integration for dvr
acceptance_criteria: Binds dvr --unikernel commands to the open-source kraft CLI engine
Compiles Kraftfiles locally and creates offline build targets
Captures and pipes compilation errors to the developer console

title: QEMU/KVM virtual slice launcher
acceptance_criteria: Spawns lightweight single-tenant QEMU/KVM virtual environments locally
Hooks standard stdio interfaces to stream agent outputs in real-time
Terminates all virtual subprocesses clean on SIGINT/SIGTERM

title: Bare-metal host hypervisor daemon architecture
acceptance_criteria: Go-based daemon running on Latitude.sh or client host Bare Metal
Exposes secure REST APIs to schedule, monitor, and kill microVM slices
Exposes process resource metrics (CPU, RAM, network) to ClickHouse telemetry
notes: Central daemon managing virtualized physical assets.

title: Firecracker microVM API orchestrator
acceptance_criteria: Orchestrates the Firecracker hypervisor process via API sockets
Launches secure, isolated multi-tenant guest OS slices in under 10ms
Enforces strict CPU/RAM limits per virtual slice to prevent starvation

title: Virtual TAP/TUN network bridge configuration
acceptance_criteria: Automates creation of isolated TAP/TUN virtual interfaces on the host
Enforces strict iptables routing separating network traffic between tenants
Validates that Tenant A guest VM cannot ping or route to Tenant B guest VM

title: Ephemeral disk teardown and secure purge pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Overwrites and purges VM overlay disks on execution termination
Purges RAM allocation of the terminated slice from the physical host
Logs secure destruction audits to the central ClickHouse database
